'''Harribore Onuta''' was the [[Medxec]] of the [[Coruscant Health Office/Legends|Coruscant Health Administration]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] which plagued the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Living on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Harribore Onuta was appointed as Medxec of the [[Coruscant Health Office/Legends|Coruscant Health Administration]] before [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], a conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Medxec Onuta oversaw the rise in [[Brainworm Rot Type A]] on the galactic capital. During an interview with [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]], Onuta blamed the rising rate of contracting Brainrot on the increased number of different species entering the planet's [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport's]] each and everyday. This statement was taken offensively by many non-Humans, believing it to be Republic anti-alien hate speech.<ref name="HNN" />
